title: Chat Waypoint
description: Automatically turns coordinates in chat into clickable links that instantly create a Xaero's Minimap waypoint. Highly customizable!
body:
![Config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e830b69167ffb2134948902d336e740dd88a24b4_0.webp)Turns raw cordinates in chat to clickable texts to instantly add a temporary waypoint to location works with 2d cordinates and 3d. Highly customizable!
The waypoint it creates is for xaero's minimap no other waypoint mods are supported at the moment (might change)
